series_metadata.series_title: Software Copyright (ITP-A.26) Compliance Plans and Plan Updates
series_metadata.series_description: Series covers compliance plans and updates regarding the State of Ohio IT Policy ITP-A.26, requiring state agencies to establish controls for the use and protection of licensed software required to conduct official state business.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office area it is superseded or rescinded ; Paper: in office area it is superseded or rescinded
